use_cases: Displaying order delivery progress with animated timeline visualization for e-commerce
Tracking shipping milestones with status indicators (completed, in-progress, pending)
Showing multi-step order completion status to customers
Visualizing logistics or fulfillment pipeline progress
Providing real-time order status updates in dashboards
ai_summary: A minimalist tracking timeline component designed for displaying order history and delivery progress. Features animated entrance effects using Framer Motion with staggered transitions, status-specific icons (Check, CircleDot, Circle), and a clean vertical timeline layout with subtle border styling. Primary use case is e-commerce order tracking interfaces.
